subcodes.first_line: O Aba'l-Futúh! Blessed art thou in this dawn. Although the conquests of kings involve the shedding of their subjects' blood, yet the victories of the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا الفتوح هنیئا لک هذا الصبوح هر چند فتح ملوک خونریزی مملوکست لکن فتح اهل
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @interpretation of dreams and visions
